headline: Bitcoin Nears $63.5K Ahead of Weekly Close

article.title: Bitcoin nears $63.5K into weekly close as trader warns of 'terrible' Monday
article.summary: Bitcoin reached its highest levels in nearly a fortnight over the weekend, but BTC price action faced an "absolutely terrible" Monday track record.

headline: SA Eyes Crypto Tax Under Current Code

article.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
article.summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

headline: EasyJet Sold to Castlelake for £5 Billion

article.title: EasyJet Agrees to Castlelake’s Latest Bid Topping £5 Billion
article.summary: EasyJet Plc agreed in principle to a takeover offer of more than £5 billion from Castlelake LP, which swooped in as the UK budget carrier was reeling from soaring jet fuel prices and suppressed demand after the Iran war.

headline: NYC Flood Risk Spikes 30% Amid Storms

article.title: New York Thunderstorms Raise Flood Risk as Heat Dissipates
article.summary: New York City will have a cooler, soggier Sunday now that the massive heat dome across the US East that taxed power grids and snarled transit has started to crack, while lingering high temperatures in Washington and across the Mid-Atlantic triggered air quality warnings.

headline: $100M Crypto Assets At Risk From Malware Outbreak

article.title: Fake Mac Clipboard App Delivers New Password-Stealing Malware
article.summary: A new Mac infostealer dubbed PamStealer impersonates the open-source Maccy clipboard manager to steal passwords and more.

headline: Bitcoin Surges Toward $53K Amid Rising Exchange Deposits

article.title: Bitcoin to $53K? Exchange Deposits Jump as Analysts Warn of Increased Volatility
article.summary: Bitcoin bounced back above $60,000 this week, but increased volatility might be on the way as crypto deposits to exchanges spike.

headline: Bitcoin ETFs Sink 8 Weeks Straight Amid $100M Inflow

article.title: Bitcoin ETFs log record eighth straight negative week despite large Thursday inflow
article.summary: Hyperliquid ETFs took in $4.3 million, their smallest week since launching in May, down from a record $111 million the week before.

headline: Trump Memecoin Losses Hit $3.8B Amid 1M Wallet Crash

article.title: Nearly 1 million wallets are down $3.81 billion on Trump’s memecoin: report
article.summary: Trump's annual financial disclosure showed a $636 million payout tied to the token and more than $1.4 billion in total crypto-related income for 2025.
